controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - branch authorisation) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - branch authorisation) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to rural co-operative banks (rcbs), hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank'
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (RCBs),
hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to rural co-operative banks (rcbs), hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank'

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co-operative banks (stcbs) and central co-operative banks (ccbs), as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act
controls.control_description:
In this context, 'Rural Co-operative Banks' shall mean State Co-operative Banks
(StCBs) and Central Co-operative Banks (CCBs), as defined in the National
Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co-operative banks (stcbs) and central co-operative banks (ccbs), as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'area of operation' of a bank means the geographical area/s of operation stated in its byelaws, as appro
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Area of Operation' of a bank means the geographical area/s of operation
stated in its byelaws, as approved by the registering authority and the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'area of operation' of a bank means the geographical area/s of operation stated in its byelaws, as appro

controls.control_objective: To ensure a corporate, regional, zonal, or any other office, by whatsoever name called, that exercises control or oversight functions on branches / offices fall
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Administrative Office' or 'Controlling Office' means a corporate,
regional, zonal, or any other office, by whatsoever name called, that
exercises control or oversight functions on Branches / Offices falling under
its jurisdiction and undertakes internal administrative functions including
oversight of bank's own staff and carries out no banking or business
transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a corporate, regional, zonal, or any other office, by whatsoever name called, that exercises control or oversight functions on branches / offices fall

controls.control_objective: To ensure a central processing centre (cpc) or an office, by whatever name called, that exclusively attends to functions such as data processing, processing of
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Back Offices' means a Central Processing Centre (CPC) or an Office, by
whatever name called, that exclusively attends to functions such as data
processing, processing of loans, verification and processing of documents,
issuance of cheque books, demand drafts etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a central processing centre (cpc) or an office, by whatever name called, that exclusively attends to functions such as data processing, processing of

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by RBI or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at least one percentage point above the minimum crar applicable to the bank as on the reference date
controls.control_description:
A bank will be considered as fully complying with ECBA if it meets the following
conditions, based on the audited financial statements as of 31st March of the
immediately preceding financial year:
(1) The CRAR should be at least one percentage point above the minimum
CRAR applicable to the bank as on the reference date;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at least one percentage point above the minimum crar applicable to the bank as on the reference date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, at the time of board resolution declaring the bank as ecba compliant/ application for authorization
controls.control_description:
and
(6) The bank should not be under any Directions / Supervisory Action
Framework / PCA of RBI / NABARD, as the case may be, at the time of Board
resolution declaring the bank as ECBA compliant/ application for
authorization;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, at the time of board resolution declaring the bank as ecba compliant/ application for authorization

controls.control_objective: To ensure determine its compliance with the ecba every year based on the audited financial statements as of 31 march of the immediately preceding fy and place i
controls.control_description:
A bank shall determine its compliance with the ECBA every year based on the
audited financial statements as of 31 March of the immediately preceding FY and
place it before its Board within 30 days from the date of adoption of the audit
report.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to determine its compliance with the ecba every year based on the audited financial statements as of 31 march of the immediately preceding fy and place i

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy itself about the compliance of the bank with ecba and pass the necessary resolution approving the same and inform the reserve bank and nabard
controls.control_description:
The Board shall satisfy itself about the compliance of the bank with ECBA
and pass the necessary resolution approving the same and inform the Reserve
Bank and NABARD within 15 calendar days from the date of the Board resolution
as per the format given in Annex I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy itself about the compliance of the bank with ecba and pass the necessary resolution approving the same and inform the reserve bank and nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to appropriate supervisory and / or enforcement action as deemed fit by the reserve bank, including but not limited to debarment from self-
controls.control_description:
In case during the supervisory review of NABARD, or even
otherwise, if a bank, which has declared itself compliant with ECBA is found to
be non-compliant, the bank shall be subject to appropriate supervisory and / or
enforcement action as deemed fit by the Reserve Bank, including but not limited
to debarment from self-reviewing itself as ECBA compliant for a period of
minimum of one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to appropriate supervisory and / or enforcement action as deemed fit by the reserve bank, including but not limited to debarment from self-

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach the reserve bank along with the notification from the state government, a resolution passed to this effect by their board and the amended bye
controls.control_description:
Therefore, DCCBs desirous
of amending their area of operation shall approach the Reserve Bank along with
the notification from the State Government, a resolution passed to this effect by
their Board and the amended byelaws registered with Registrar of Co-operative
Societies (RCS).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach the reserve bank along with the notification from the state government, a resolution passed to this effect by their board and the amended bye

controls.control_objective: To ensure directly approach the reserve bank for amendment in the banking license with the above-mentioned documents
controls.control_description:
DCCBs do not require NOC from the Reserve Bank for
amendment of byelaws in this regard and may directly approach the Reserve
Bank for amendment in the banking license with the above-mentioned
documents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to directly approach the reserve bank for amendment in the banking license with the above-mentioned documents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per procedure given in chapter iii of this master direction
controls.control_description:
The reporting of
opening a new place of business shall be as per procedure given in Chapter III of
this Master Direction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per procedure given in chapter iii of this master direction

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that there are no restrictions imposed by the local development or other authorities for setting up a commercial establishment in the locality
controls.control_description:
The bank should ensure that there are no restrictions imposed by the local
development or other authorities for setting up a commercial establishment in the
locality where the new place of business is proposed to be opened.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that there are no restrictions imposed by the local development or other authorities for setting up a commercial establishment in the locality

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply for opening branches by submitting an annual business plan (abp)
controls.control_description:
Prior Approval Route: For opening of branches of
more than 15% allowed under automatic route, banks
which are in compliance with ECBA, may apply for
opening branches by submitting an Annual Business
Plan (ABP), subject to additional conditions at Para 20
to 24.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply for opening branches by submitting an annual business plan (abp)

controls.control_objective: To ensure open ecs under both automatic route and prior approval route
controls.control_description:
b) Opening of an EC A bank in compliance with ECBA may open ECs
under both automatic route and prior approval route,
subject to additional conditions at para 25 to 28 below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open ecs under both automatic route and prior approval route

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply for opening ecs by submitting an annual business plan (abp)
controls.control_description:
Prior Approval Route: A bank may apply for opening
ECs by submitting an Annual Business Plan (ABP).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply for opening ecs by submitting an annual business plan (abp)

controls.control_objective: To ensure open such offices within its area of operation as per its business requirements, without processing centre, prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
d) Opening of a Central
A bank may open such offices within its area of
operation as per its business requirements, without
Processing Centre,
prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open such offices within its area of operation as per its business requirements, without processing centre, prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be (regional / zonal / submitted as a part of abp
controls.control_description:
The application may be
(Regional / Zonal /
submitted as a part of ABP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be (regional / zonal / submitted as a part of abp

controls.control_objective: To ensure be involved in business origination
controls.control_description:
Administrative Office)
#
# Such offices should not be involved in business origination.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be involved in business origination

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in compliance with ecba
controls.control_description:
A bank is eligible to open a branch in its area of operation (including the
upgradation of an extension counter that is in operation for more than three years)
under the automatic route subject to the following conditions:
(1) The bank shall be in compliance with ECBA;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in compliance with ecba

controls.control_objective: To ensure have sufficient headroom capital (methodology given in part c of annex ii)
controls.control_description:
and
(2) The bank should have sufficient headroom capital (methodology given in Part
C of Annex II).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have sufficient headroom capital (methodology given in part c of annex ii)

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a policy for opening branches, approved by its board of directors
controls.control_description:
The bank shall put in place a policy for opening branches, approved by its Board
of Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a policy for opening branches, approved by its board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear in mind its financial health, viability of the proposed branches and bank's ability to render satisfactory customer service
controls.control_description:
While formulating the said policy, the bank shall bear in mind its
financial health, viability of the proposed branches and bank's ability to render
satisfactory customer service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear in mind its financial health, viability of the proposed branches and bank's ability to render satisfactory customer service

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed periodically to keep it aligned with the evolving banking landscape and revision
controls.control_description:
The policy must be reviewed periodically to keep it
aligned with the evolving banking landscape and revision, if any, in Reserve Bank
guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed periodically to keep it aligned with the evolving banking landscape and revision

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the proposal for opening of such branches in a particular financial year, based on the policy, is duly approved by its board of directors
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank shall ensure that the proposal for opening of such
branches in a particular financial year, based on the policy, is duly approved by its
Board of Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure that the proposal for opening of such branches in a particular financial year, based on the policy, is duly approved by its board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply for opening branches under the prior approval route by submission of a single annual business plan (abp) (format given in annex ii) in a financi
controls.control_description:
Banks in compliance with ECBA and desirous of opening of branches of more than
15 per cent allowed under automatic route, may apply for opening branches under
the Prior Approval Route by submission of a single Annual Business Plan (ABP)
(format given in Annex II) in a financial year, along with application as per Form V
of the Banking Regulation (Co-operative Societies) Rules, 1966.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply for opening branches under the prior approval route by submission of a single annual business plan (abp) (format given in annex ii) in a financi

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a policy as at para 19
controls.control_description:
The bank shall
have a policy as at para 19.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a policy as at para 19

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted by the bank well in advance
controls.control_description: ABP for a financial year, should be submitted by the bank well in advance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted by the bank well in advance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be operationalised, or else the approval will lapse automatically
controls.control_description:
The approval granted by the
Reserve Bank for opening the branch will be valid till March 31 of concerned
financial year, by which time the branch must be operationalised, or else the
approval will lapse automatically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be operationalised, or else the approval will lapse automatically

controls.control_objective: To ensure impact the approvals in future, including debarment from opening new branches for the next two years
controls.control_description:
Non-operationalisation of at least 75 per cent of approved
branches within permitted time would be viewed seriously and may impact the
approvals in future, including debarment from opening new branches for the next
two years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impact the approvals in future, including debarment from opening new branches for the next two years

controls.control_objective: To ensure open a branch only for maintaining and servicing deposits of co-operative banks
controls.control_description:
In case a branch is required in district headquarters, the bank may
open a branch only for maintaining and servicing deposits of co-operative banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open a branch only for maintaining and servicing deposits of co-operative banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to open a branch
controls.control_description:
In semi-urban / rural areas, where DCCB is non-existent, weak or virtually defunct,
StCB may be allowed to open a branch, provided the DCCB in the adjoining district
is not in a position to extend its area of operation to cover the area (where DCCB
is non-existent in the concerned district) or to take over the weak / defunct DCCB
through merger.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to open a branch

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly justify the reasons for opening each branch / extension counter while applying under abp
controls.control_description:
Such StCB shall clearly justify the reasons for opening each
branch / extension counter while applying under ABP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly justify the reasons for opening each branch / extension counter while applying under abp

controls.control_objective: To ensure open branch / extension counters in urban as well as rural areas
controls.control_description:
In a two-tier co-operative
credit structure consisting of StCB and PACS, a StCB may open branch /
extension counters in urban as well as rural areas.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open branch / extension counters in urban as well as rural areas

controls.control_objective: To ensure also clearly justify the reasons for opening each branch / extension counter while applying under abp
controls.control_description:
However, the StCB shall also
clearly justify the reasons for opening each branch / extension counter while
applying under ABP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also clearly justify the reasons for opening each branch / extension counter while applying under abp

controls.control_objective: To ensure be opened within the premises of educational institutions, big offices, factories and hospitals of which the co-operative bank concerned is the princi
controls.control_description:
An EC may be opened within the premises of educational institutions, big offices,
factories and hospitals of which the co-operative bank concerned is the principal
banker.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be opened within the premises of educational institutions, big offices, factories and hospitals of which the co-operative bank concerned is the princi

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain a declaration from the institution in which it proposes to open ec in the format as per annex iv
controls.control_description:
The bank shall obtain a declaration from the institution in which it proposes
to open EC in the format as per Annex IV.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain a declaration from the institution in which it proposes to open ec in the format as per annex iv

controls.control_objective: To ensure also open an ec provided it is not considered feasible by the principal banker and / or the base branch of the principal banker is beyond 10 kilometre
controls.control_description:
Other bankers to such entities may also
open an EC provided it is not considered feasible by the principal banker and / or
the base branch of the principal banker is beyond 10 kilometres from the proposed
EC, after obtaining written consent from the principal banker.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also open an ec provided it is not considered feasible by the principal banker and / or the base branch of the principal banker is beyond 10 kilometre

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be opened in the residential colonies provided no other branch / ec is already existing in the colony and no restrictions have been imposed by th
controls.control_description:
An EC may also be
opened in the residential colonies provided no other branch / EC is already existing
in the colony and no restrictions have been imposed by the local development or
any other authorities for setting up a commercial establishment in the residential
colony / locality.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be opened in the residential colonies provided no other branch / ec is already existing in the colony and no restrictions have been imposed by th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be opened in a marketplace, shopping centre, etc
controls.control_description:
No extension counter should be opened in a marketplace,
shopping centre, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be opened in a marketplace, shopping centre, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within a distance of 10 kilometres
controls.control_description:
Base branch of the bank to which the proposed EC is linked should be within a
distance of 10 kilometres.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be within a distance of 10 kilometres

controls.control_objective: To ensure be incorporated in the accounts of the base branch on a day-to-day basis
controls.control_description:
The transactions carried out in the EC should be
incorporated in the accounts of the base branch on a day-to-day basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be incorporated in the accounts of the base branch on a day-to-day basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account important factors such as need, viability, and overall merits of opening the ec, including the bank's ability to deploy adequate res
controls.control_description:
While opening an EC, the bank should take into account important factors such as
need, viability, and overall merits of opening the EC, including the bank's ability to
deploy adequate resources and exercise internal controls.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into account important factors such as need, viability, and overall merits of opening the ec, including the bank's ability to deploy adequate res

controls.control_objective: To ensure be restricted to: (1) deposit / withdrawal transactions
controls.control_description:
The facilities at an EC should be restricted to:
(1) deposit / withdrawal transactions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be restricted to: (1) deposit / withdrawal transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer all its products and services through the atm channels
controls.control_description:
A bank may offer all its products and services through the ATM channels, provided
the technology permits and adequate checks are put in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer all its products and services through the atm channels

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recorded in the books of the respective base branch / centralised data centre
controls.control_description:
The business
transacted at the ATM shall be recorded in the books of the respective base branch
/ Centralised Data Centre.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recorded in the books of the respective base branch / centralised data centre

controls.control_objective: To ensure utilize the atm screens to display their own products, or products for which it acts as an agent, or customer service / financial inclusion / cyber sa
controls.control_description:
However, the bank may utilize the ATM screens to display their own
products, or products for which it acts as an agent, or customer service / financial
inclusion / cyber safety messages.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to utilize the atm screens to display their own products, or products for which it acts as an agent, or customer service / financial inclusion / cyber sa

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable to cdms and crms
controls.control_description:
These guidelines shall also be applicable to
CDMs and CRMs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be applicable to cdms and crms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken by the board after taking into account all the relevant factors, including viability, and should be properly recorded / minuted in the procee
controls.control_description:
The decision to shift a place of business shall be taken by the Board after taking
into account all the relevant factors, including viability, and should be properly
recorded / minuted in the proceedings of the Board meeting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken by the board after taking into account all the relevant factors, including viability, and should be properly recorded / minuted in the procee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given to all existing depositors / clients of the branch / ec through sms / public notice / letters at least one month in advance of shifting
controls.control_description:
Proper notice should be given to all existing depositors / clients of the branch / EC
through SMS / public notice / letters at least one month in advance of shifting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given to all existing depositors / clients of the branch / ec through sms / public notice / letters at least one month in advance of shifting

controls.control_objective: To ensure be construed as shifting
controls.control_description:
Closing a branch / EC in one city / town and opening in another shall not be
construed as shifting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be construed as shifting

controls.control_objective: To ensure shift its office
controls.control_description:
However, a bank may shift its office, except Head Office,
from one town / city to another within its area of operation, without prior approval
of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to shift its office

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions: (1) the bank should not have been placed under any directions under section 35a of the banking regulation act
controls.control_description:
Closure of a
branch / extension counter shall be subject to the following conditions:
(1) The bank should not have been placed under any Directions under section
35A of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (AACS).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following conditions: (1) the bank should not have been placed under any directions under section 35a of the banking regulation act

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken by the board after taking into account all the relevant factors and should be properly noted in the official record of proceedings of the boa
controls.control_description:
(2) The decision to close down the branch / EC should be taken by the Board after
taking into account all the relevant factors and should be properly noted in the
official record of proceedings of the Board meeting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken by the board after taking into account all the relevant factors and should be properly noted in the official record of proceedings of the boa

controls.control_objective: To ensure give two months' notice in advance to all existing depositors / clients of the branch, including through press releases in leading local newspapers, a
controls.control_description:
(3) The bank should give two months' notice in advance to all existing depositors
/ clients of the branch, including through press releases in leading local
newspapers, as well as communicate to each constituent of the branch well in
advance of the closure of the branch.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give two months' notice in advance to all existing depositors / clients of the branch, including through press releases in leading local newspapers, a

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to the reserve bank, as per the timeline (reporting format given in annex iii), along with copies of the board resolution
controls.control_description:
(4) The bank should report to the Reserve Bank, as per the timeline (reporting
format given in Annex III), along with copies of the Board resolution.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to the reserve bank, as per the timeline (reporting format given in annex iii), along with copies of the board resolution

controls.control_objective: To ensure surrender the branch license in original
controls.control_description:
(5) The bank should surrender the branch license in original, wherever applicable,
to the Reserve Bank within 15 calendar days of closing the branch.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to surrender the branch license in original

controls.control_objective: To ensure preserve all the relevant records and make them available to the reserve bank / nabard for scrutiny
controls.control_description:
(6) The bank should preserve all the relevant records and make them available to
the Reserve Bank / NABARD for scrutiny.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preserve all the relevant records and make them available to the reserve bank / nabard for scrutiny

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide doorstep banking services to its customers on a voluntary basis, without prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
A bank may provide doorstep banking services to its customers on a voluntary
basis, without prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide doorstep banking services to its customers on a voluntary basis, without prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a scheme for providing doorstep banking services to its customers, with the approval of their boards, in accordance with the guidelines prov
controls.control_description:
The bank may formulate a scheme for providing doorstep banking services to its
customers, with the approval of their Boards, in accordance with the guidelines
provided in Annex V.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate a scheme for providing doorstep banking services to its customers, with the approval of their boards, in accordance with the guidelines prov

controls.control_objective: To ensure be informed to the reserve bank within 15 calendar days of implementing the scheme
controls.control_description:
The details of the scheme may be informed to the Reserve
Bank within 15 calendar days of implementing the scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be informed to the reserve bank within 15 calendar days of implementing the scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer doorstep banking services to customers either directly through its own employees or through agents
controls.control_description:
A bank having deposit of more than ₹1000 crore as on March 31 of previous
financial year may offer doorstep banking services to customers either directly
through its own employees or through agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer doorstep banking services to customers either directly through its own employees or through agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer doorstep banking services only through their permanent employees
controls.control_description:
Other banks shall offer doorstep
banking services only through their permanent employees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer doorstep banking services only through their permanent employees

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account the various risks that may arise on account of offering doorstep banking services, such as outsourcing risk, operational risk, reput
controls.control_description:
The bank shall take
into account the various risks that may arise on account of offering Doorstep
Banking Services, such as outsourcing risk, operational risk, reputational risk, etc.,
to customers either directly through its own employees or through agents and take
all necessary steps to manage the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into account the various risks that may arise on account of offering doorstep banking services, such as outsourcing risk, operational risk, reput

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed by the board of the bank on an annual basis
controls.control_description:
The operation of the scheme may be reviewed by the Board of the bank on an
annual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed by the board of the bank on an annual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure to obtain prior approval of the reserve bank for: (1) sale of bank's own premises
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to obtain prior approval of the reserve bank for: (1) sale of bank's own premises

controls.control_objective: To ensure to obtain approval from the reserve bank by submitting the application through pravaah portal as per the enclosed format given in annex
controls.control_description:
Banks are required to obtain approval from the Reserve Bank by submitting the
application through PRAVAAH portal as per the enclosed format given in Annex
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to obtain approval from the reserve bank by submitting the application through pravaah portal as per the enclosed format given in annex

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into any firm commitment to the acquisition of premises for shifting an office thereat until the reserve bank's prior approval has been obtained
controls.control_description:
The bank should not enter into any firm commitment to the acquisition of
premises for shifting an office thereat until the Reserve Bank's prior approval has
been obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into any firm commitment to the acquisition of premises for shifting an office thereat until the reserve bank's prior approval has been obtained

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in its own interest, take steps to cancel or nullify it
controls.control_description:
Therefore, if a bank has inadvertently made any such commitment,
it should, in its own interest, take steps to cancel or nullify it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in its own interest, take steps to cancel or nullify it

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit their information in a single proforma (annex i of cisbi) online on the cisbi portal
controls.control_description:
Under this system, banks are required to submit their information in a
single Proforma (Annex I of CISBI) online on the CISBI portal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit their information in a single proforma (annex i of cisbi) online on the cisbi portal

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit information on the cisbi portal as per guidelines given in annex vi, and thereafter, bank branch / office / naio / csp codes would be allotted
controls.control_description:
Banks should submit information on
the CISBI portal as per guidelines given in Annex VI, and thereafter, bank branch
/ office / NAIO / CSP codes would be allotted by CISBI after due validations.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to submit information on the cisbi portal as per guidelines given in annex vi, and thereafter, bank branch / office / naio / csp codes would be allotted

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit immediately and, in any case, not later than seven calendar days, the information relating to the opening, closure, merger, shifting and conver
controls.control_description:
All banks should
submit immediately and, in any case, not later than seven calendar days, the
information relating to the opening, closure, merger, shifting and conversion of
bank branches / offices / NAIOs / CSPs online through the CISBI portal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit immediately and, in any case, not later than seven calendar days, the information relating to the opening, closure, merger, shifting and conver

controls.control_objective: To ensure generate a 'nil report' in cisbi for the position as on last day of the previous month, indicating the total number of functioning branches, offices
controls.control_description:
Further, in order to ensure the correctness of data on CISBI, in the last week of
every month, banks shall generate a 'NIL Report' in CISBI for the position as on
last day of the previous month, indicating the total number of functioning branches,
offices, NAIOs, CSPs;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to generate a 'nil report' in cisbi for the position as on last day of the previous month, indicating the total number of functioning branches, offices

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure to submit correct and updated bank-level information in all the fields where submission / updation rights are available with the bank
controls.control_description:
After
gaining first-time access to the system, banks shall ensure to submit correct and
updated bank-level information in all the fields where submission / updation rights
are available with the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to ensure to submit correct and updated bank-level information in all the fields where submission / updation rights are available with the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent by banks to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
After the initial submission of information on the CISBI
portal, a one-time confirmation stating that "correct and updated Bank level
information has been submitted on CISBI" shall be sent by banks to the Regional
Office concerned of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent by banks to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted for updation on the cisbi portal on an immediate basis by the banks
controls.control_description:
Any subsequent changes in the bank-level
information shall be submitted for updation on the CISBI portal on an immediate
basis by the banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted for updation on the cisbi portal on an immediate basis by the banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter the complete and clear (without abbreviations) particulars on the banking channel name, address, geotagging, etc
controls.control_description:
The banks shall enter the complete and clear (without
abbreviations) particulars on the Banking Channel Name, Address, geotagging,
etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter the complete and clear (without abbreviations) particulars on the banking channel name, address, geotagging, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured by the bank
controls.control_description:
Reporting Timeline: Reporting on the CISBI portal within the prescribed time of
seven calendar days, shall be ensured by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure report such event / changes to the reserve bank within 15 calendar days (reporting format given in annex iii)
controls.control_description:
Any instance for which a prior
approval of the Reserve Bank is not required for any authorisation in terms of these
Directions, the bank shall report such event / changes to the Reserve Bank within
15 calendar days (reporting format given in Annex III).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report such event / changes to the reserve bank within 15 calendar days (reporting format given in annex iii)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be regional office of nabard which, in turn, shall forward the applications to the regional office of the reserve bank, along with their comments and
controls.control_description:
Point of contact for application / submission of information: The point of contact
for all matters related to this Direction shall be Regional Office of NABARD which,
in turn, shall forward the applications to the Regional Office of the Reserve Bank,
along with their comments and recommendations on the matter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be regional office of nabard which, in turn, shall forward the applications to the regional office of the reserve bank, along with their comments and

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit their applications to the reserve bank using relevant application forms in the pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
Note: Banks shall submit their applications to the Reserve Bank using relevant
application forms in the PRAVAAH portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit their applications to the reserve bank using relevant application forms in the pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to
the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at least one percentage point above the minimum crar applicable 2 net npas of not more than 3% 3 net profit during the last two financial years no default in the maintenance of crr / slr during the preceding and current financial year till the time of board resolution declaring the bank as ecba compliant / application for authorization 5 cbs fully implemented in the bank 6 whether the bank is under directions / supervisory action framework / pca 7 details
controls.control_description:
Status (Yes / No)
1 CRAR should be at least one percentage point
above the minimum CRAR applicable
2 Net NPAs of not more than 3%
3 Net Profit during the last two financial years
No default in the maintenance of CRR / SLR during the
preceding and current financial year till the time of Board
resolution declaring the bank as ECBA compliant / application
for authorization
5 CBS fully implemented in the bank
6 Whether the bank is under Directions / Supervisory Action
Framework / PCA
7 Details, if any, of prohibition for any authorization by RBI / NABARD
Enclosures:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be at least one percentage point above the minimum crar applicable 2 net npas of not more than 3% 3 net profit during the last two financial years no default in the maintenance of crr / slr during the preceding and current financial year till the time of board resolution declaring the bank as ecba compliant / application for authorization 5 cbs fully implemented in the bank 6 whether the bank is under directions / supervisory action framework / pca 7 details

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish details of the proposed medium-term policy for its branch expansion for a period of 3 years along with expected level of business in the next
controls.control_description:
Medium term policy for branch expansion programme: Bank may furnish details of
the proposed medium-term policy for its branch expansion for a period of 3 years along
with expected level of business in the next 3 years in terms of deposits and advances.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to furnish details of the proposed medium-term policy for its branch expansion for a period of 3 years along with expected level of business in the next

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted
controls.control_description:
Details of proposed new branches
Name of the centre
Name of the
Members at the proposed
Population
with address and Pin
district and
centre (only for Salary Earners'
of the centre
code
state
Banks)
Note: Reasons for the proposed branch including adequacy of banking facilities at the
centre, business prospects at the proposed place of business within 12 months (an
estimate of minimum business which the bank expects to attract) may be submitted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted (attach extra sheet if necessary)
controls.control_description:
If yes,
details thereof may be submitted (attach extra sheet if necessary).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted (attach extra sheet if necessary)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted for each action
controls.control_description: Note: Separate statements may be submitted for each action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted for each action

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be indicated separately
controls.control_description:
attached separately to each of the institutions, the
name and the distance of their bankers should also be indicated separately.)
∗ Strike out whichever is not applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be indicated separately

controls.control_objective: To ensure take suitable steps to educate their employees and agents to enable them to detect forged and mutilated notes so as to avoid frauds and disputes with
controls.control_description:
The banks which offer services of pick-up of cash shall take suitable steps to
educate their employees and agents to enable them to detect forged and mutilated
notes so as to avoid frauds and disputes with customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take suitable steps to educate their employees and agents to enable them to detect forged and mutilated notes so as to avoid frauds and disputes with

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that the policy approved by the board lays down the broad principles for selection of agents and payment of fee / commission etc
controls.control_description:
Where banks engage the services of Agents for delivery of services, it should be
ensured that the policy approved by the Board lays down the broad principles for
selection of agents and payment of fee / commission etc.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be ensured that the policy approved by the board lays down the broad principles for selection of agents and payment of fee / commission etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the guidelines on reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025 and ensure that the princ
controls.control_description:
Banks must refer to the
guidelines on Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Managing Risks in
Outsourcing) Directions, 2025 and ensure that the principles enumerated therein are
complied with while offering Doorstep Banking Services.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to refer to the guidelines on reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025 and ensure that the princ

controls.control_objective: To ensure be acknowledged by issuing a receipt on behalf of the bank
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be acknowledged by issuing a receipt on behalf of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be credited to the customer's account on the same day or next working day, depending on the time of collection
controls.control_description:
b) Cash collected from the customer should be credited to the customer's account
on the same day or next working day, depending on the time of collection;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be credited to the customer's account on the same day or next working day, depending on the time of collection

controls.control_objective: To ensure be informed of the date of credit by issuing a suitable advice
controls.control_description:
c) At the time of collection of cash, the customer should be informed of the date
of credit by issuing a suitable advice;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be informed of the date of credit by issuing a suitable advice

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done by debit to the account on the basis of requisition in writing / cheque received and not against cash or instruments collected at the doorstep
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done by debit to the account on the basis of requisition in writing / cheque received and not against cash or instruments collected at the doorstep

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided for collection of kyc documents, life certificate
controls.control_description:
e) Acknowledgment should be provided for collection of KYC documents, Life
Certificate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided for collection of kyc documents, life certificate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that the agreement entered into with the customer does not entail any legal or financial liability on the bank for failure to offer doorste
controls.control_description:
It shall be ensured that the agreement entered into with the customer does not entail
any legal or financial liability on the bank for failure to offer doorstep services under
circumstances beyond its control.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that the agreement entered into with the customer does not entail any legal or financial liability on the bank for failure to offer doorste

controls.control_objective: To ensure be seen as a mere extension of banking services offered at the branch and the liability of the bank should be the same as if the transactions were con
controls.control_description:
The services should be seen as a mere extension
of banking services offered at the branch and the liability of the bank should be the
same as if the transactions were conducted at the branch.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be seen as a mere extension of banking services offered at the branch and the liability of the bank should be the same as if the transactions were con

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide any right to the customer to claim the services at his doorstep
controls.control_description:
The agreement should not
provide any right to the customer to claim the services at his doorstep.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide any right to the customer to claim the services at his doorstep

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide cash limits (for collection as well as delivery) for their employees / agents and customers, for doorstep banking
controls.control_description:
The bank should provide cash limits (for collection as well as delivery) for their
employees / agents and customers, for doorstep banking.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide cash limits (for collection as well as delivery) for their employees / agents and customers, for doorstep banking

controls.control_objective: To ensure also take all necessary steps to contain technology risk while providing these services
controls.control_description:
The bank should also take
all necessary steps to contain technology risk while providing these services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also take all necessary steps to contain technology risk while providing these services

controls.control_objective: To ensure be incorporated in the policy approved by the board and should form part of the agreement entered into with the customer
controls.control_description:
Charges, if any, to be levied on the customer for doorstep services should be
incorporated in the policy approved by the Board and should form part of the
agreement entered into with the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be incorporated in the policy approved by the board and should form part of the agreement entered into with the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prominently indicated on the banks' website and brochures offering doorstep services
controls.control_description:
The charges should be prominently
indicated on the banks' website and brochures offering doorstep services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prominently indicated on the banks' website and brochures offering doorstep services

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure compliance with the reserve bank of india (rural co- operative banks - know your customer) directions, 2025 with regard to customer identificat
controls.control_description:
Other conditions
a) Banks shall ensure compliance with the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-
operative Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 with regard to
customer identification procedures while offering doorstep services to their
customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure compliance with the reserve bank of india (rural co- operative banks - know your customer) directions, 2025 with regard to customer identificat

controls.control_objective: To ensure be offered at either the residence or office of the customer as opted by the customer, the address of which should be clearly and explicitly mentioned
controls.control_description:
b) The services should be offered at either the residence or office of the customer
as opted by the customer, the address of which should be clearly and explicitly
mentioned in the agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be offered at either the residence or office of the customer as opted by the customer, the address of which should be clearly and explicitly mentioned

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly specify that the bank will be responsible for the acts of omission and commission of its 'agent'
controls.control_description:
c) The agreement / contract with the customer shall clearly specify that the bank
will be responsible for the acts of omission and commission of its 'agent'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly specify that the bank will be responsible for the acts of omission and commission of its 'agent'

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep in view the restrictions imposed by section 10 (1) (b) (ii) of the banking regulation act, 1949, while making payments for the services outsource
controls.control_description:
d) Banks shall keep in view the restrictions imposed by Section 10 (1) (b) (ii) of
the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, while making payments for the services
outsourced.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep in view the restrictions imposed by section 10 (1) (b) (ii) of the banking regulation act, 1949, while making payments for the services outsource

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute an appropriate grievance redressal machinery internally for redressing complaints about services rendered by its employees / agents
controls.control_description:
Redressal of Grievance
a) Banks should constitute an appropriate Grievance Redressal Machinery
internally for redressing complaints about services rendered by its employees /
agents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute an appropriate grievance redressal machinery internally for redressing complaints about services rendered by its employees / agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available to the customers including on the bank's website
controls.control_description:
The name and telephone number of the designated Grievance
Redressal Officer of the bank should be made available to the customers
including on the bank's website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available to the customers including on the bank's website

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that genuine grievances of customers are redressed promptly
controls.control_description:
The designated officer should ensure that
genuine grievances of customers are redressed promptly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that genuine grievances of customers are redressed promptly

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted in cisbi
controls.control_description:
Under this system, information related to Bank, Branches, Office, NAIOs, other fixed
customer service points (CSPs) (e.g., ATMs, etc.) must be submitted in CISBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted in cisbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure to submit the above information in cisbi which will be validated and published by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
All the banks are required to submit the above information in CISBI which will be
validated and published by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to submit the above information in cisbi which will be validated and published by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide an authorised email id on which the reserve bank can forward "bank admin id" and its password in two different emails
controls.control_description:
For getting "Bank Admin ID", a bank
should provide an authorised email ID on which the Reserve Bank can forward "Bank
Admin ID" and its password in two different emails.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide an authorised email id on which the reserve bank can forward "bank admin id" and its password in two different emails

controls.control_objective: To ensure contact the reserve bank with a request letter providing details of the bank's nodal person, an email id for receiving the login credentials and certa
controls.control_description:
A new bank seeking reporting
access to CISBI, should contact the Reserve Bank with a request letter providing
details of the bank's nodal person, an email ID for receiving the login credentials and
certain basic documents as under:
a) Certificate of incorporation from the Registrar of Co-operative Societies /
Central Registrar of Co-operative Societies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contact the reserve bank with a request letter providing details of the bank's nodal person, an email id for receiving the login credentials and certa

controls.control_objective: To ensure login on the cisbi portal (https://cisbi
controls.control_description:
Bank should login on the CISBI portal (https://cisbi.rbi.org.in) using its allotted "Bank
Admin ID" and change the allotted password on the first login.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to login on the cisbi portal (https://cisbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure fill all other information pertaining to the bank and submit on the cisbi portal
controls.control_description:
Bank should fill all other information pertaining to the bank and submit on the CISBI
portal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to fill all other information pertaining to the bank and submit on the cisbi portal

controls.control_objective: To ensure edit the existing information and indicate the effective date of change
controls.control_description:
For reporting any change in the existing information, banks should edit the existing
information and indicate the effective date of change.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to edit the existing information and indicate the effective date of change

controls.control_objective: To ensure reset the password every three months
controls.control_description: Banks must reset the password every three months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reset the password every three months

controls.control_objective: To ensure first update the information in cisbi, then generate "nil report" and submit it through cisbi
controls.control_description:
If a bank finds any difference in the "Nil
Report" generated by CISBI and the actual status, it should first update the information
in CISBI, then generate "Nil Report" and submit it through CISBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to first update the information in cisbi, then generate "nil report" and submit it through cisbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure generate 'nil report' for position as on last day of previous month, authenticate it and submit on cisbi
controls.control_description:
In the last week of every month, banks shall generate 'NIL Report' for position as
on last day of previous month, authenticate it and submit on CISBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to generate 'nil report' for position as on last day of previous month, authenticate it and submit on cisbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be generated and submitted in the last week of july 2025
controls.control_description:
For example, 'NIL
Report' for the month of June 2025 shall be generated and submitted in the last week
of July 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be generated and submitted in the last week of july 2025
